description: HTTP over TLS — web application enumeration, directory brute-forcing, and vulnerability scanning. Same tools as port 80 with SSL/TLS flags.

tools.name: gobuster — Directory Brute-force (HTTPS)
tools.description: Brute-force directories and files on HTTPS web servers.

commands.title: Directory brute-force (common wordlist)
commands.description: Brute-force directories using a common wordlist with TLS certificate verification disabled.

commands.title: Directory brute-force (medium wordlist)
commands.description: Brute-force with a medium wordlist and 50 threads.

commands.title: With file extensions
commands.description: Brute-force directories and files with common web extensions.

tools.name: feroxbuster (HTTPS)
tools.description: Fast, recursive content discovery with auto-filtering for HTTPS targets.

commands.title: Default scan (HTTPS)
commands.description: Recursive directory brute-force with insecure TLS.

commands.title: With extensions and depth
commands.description: Recursive scan with extensions, depth 3, and 50 threads.

tools.name: nikto (HTTPS)
tools.description: Web vulnerability scanner for HTTPS targets.

commands.title: Default scan (HTTPS)
commands.description: Run default vulnerability scan with SSL enabled.

commands.title: Scan with output file
commands.description: Run scan and save results to a file.

tools.name: sslscan
tools.description: SSL/TLS configuration scanner for identifying weak ciphers, protocols, and certificate issues.

commands.title: Full SSL/TLS scan
commands.description: Enumerate supported SSL/TLS versions, ciphers, and certificate details.

commands.title: Scan specific port
commands.description: Scan SSL/TLS configuration on a non-standard port.

tools.name: testssl.sh
tools.description: Comprehensive SSL/TLS testing tool for checking vulnerabilities like Heartbleed, POODLE, BEAST, etc.

commands.title: Check specific vulnerabilities
commands.description: Check only for known SSL/TLS vulnerabilities.

commands.title: Check ciphers only
commands.description: List supported ciphers per protocol version.
